task: Advanced high-value task: Quantum Circuit Resource Option Gatekeeping Rule Revision. Scenario: a governance team wants a reproducible analysis that another reviewer can rerun from the row data alone for quantum circuit resource option. Embedded packet: Records: R1 logical_qubits=74 T_depth=111 T_count=7; R2 logical_qubits=83 T_depth=107 T_count=10; R3 logical_qubits=69 T_depth=122 T_count=6. Remediation options: O1 changes logical_qubits by -12% cost=93500; O2 changes T_depth by -18% cost=107100; O3 changes T_count by -25% cost=64900; max_budget=133200. Rules and constraints: physical_qubits=logical*1200; runtime=T_depth*1us; flag >100k qubits or >1s; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: quantify the operational consequence of each exception and rank follow-up actions by urgency and evidentiary strength. Deliver quantum_resource_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
